metadata.note: The US-Russia relationship mechanism itself: who talks to whom, in what format, and whether relations are warming or freezing. Dyad-AND gate (centroid_ids={AMERICAS-USA} + primary_target=EUROPE-RUSSIA) makes generic diplomacy nouns safe. EXCLUDES ceasefire / peace-plan / mediation verbs -- those stay with ukraine_peace_negotiations (808 events). Abu Dhabi DROPPED after sampling: all 5 samples were the Russia-Ukraine-US trilateral, i.e. Ukraine-atomic content, not the bilateral channel. Alaska/Anchorage KEPT (the Trump-Putin bilateral summit). Bare 'call' DROPPED -- word-START matches called/calls/calling ('Zelensky calls for...'); 'talks'/'meeting' carry the concept. Trump and Putin excluded per rule 4 (heads of state appear in every theater); the working principals of the channel ARE this FN's own-side actors (vocab spec pillar 1). Pre-audit on 180d dyad corpus: Lavrov 116, envoy 105, Witkoff 63, Rubio 60, summit 45, ambassador 30, dialogue 23, delegation 21, Kushner 18, Dmitriev 17, Anchorage 11.
